strengths: ~15 years of polyglot engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput services
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial initiative
Active contributor to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at current role
concerns: No Master's/PhD in AI and limited demonstrated AI/ML product depth
Career history is senior/staff IC rather than director-level or principal strategic influence
Minimal evidence of advising strategic customers or large-scale cloud platform strategy
response.justification: The candidate brings broad, long-tenured engineering experience across many stacks and some recent exposure to AI-agent tooling and MCP frameworks, along with entrepreneurial work via GISCollective. However, the resume shows limited evidence of the recognized AI expertise, director-level strategic influence, and customer-facing advisory work expected for a Principal Engineer focused on AI strategy.
